title: eragrostis stolonifera
intro: Eragrostis stolonifera, also known as creekbank lovegrass, is a type of perennial grass native to eastern Australia and New Zealand. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to offer several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as having potential antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Eragrostis stolonifera can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
